verses.text: Topa tungah lungdamna ko-in, ama min phat un la, ama sepnate khempeuh mite lakah kitheisak un
Ama tungah la sa un. Ama tungah phatna la sa un la, a lamdang a septe khempeuh gen ciat ta un
Ama min siangtho hangin lungdam un la, Topa a zong mite lungdam ta hen
Topa leh ama huh ding zon' belin nei un la, a tawntungin ama maipha zong niloh un
No ama nasem, Abraham' suanlekhak, Jakob' tate, ama teel mite aw, ama sepsa a lamdang nate, ama na lamdang lahte, a genkhiat a thukhennate phawk ciat ta un
Amah pen Topa, eite' Pasian hi a, ama thupiaknate leitung khempeuh in a zuih ding ahi hi

“Na luah dingin Kanaan gam ka hong pia ding hi,” ci-in Abraham tawh thuciam a bawlsa, Isaac tungah a thuciamsa, Jakob tungah thupiakna a kipsak, Israel tungah tawntung thuciamna, ama thupiaksa kammal, ama thuciamna pen khang tul khat dongin amah in phawk ngitnget hi
Amaute tawm mahmahin, bangmah genthamlo uh a, khualmi hi-in
minam khat panin minam dang khatah, gam khat pan gam khatah a vak kawikawi laitakun
amah in amaute kuamah nengniamsak lo hi. Amaute' hangin amah in kumpite thuhilhin
“Ka sathau nilhte sukha kei un; ka kamsangte tungah siatna bawl kei un,” ci hi
Amah in leitungah kialpi tungsakin, nektheih an khempeuh a siatsak ciangin
amah in, Josef a kici, sila-a a kizuak mi khat, amaute' mai-ah a sawl hi
Ama khete pen kolte in nasak a, ama ngawng pen sikkol sungah kikoih hi
Ama thugente a tun' matengin Topa in amah ze-et hi
Amah a khahkhia dingin kumpipa in mi paisak a, mihingte a ukpa in amah a khahkhia hi
Josef in kumpipa' uliante ama ut bangin lamlakin, a upate pen pilna hilhsak a, ama innsung topa ama neihsa khempeuh a ukpa-in a koih hi
Tua ciangin Egypt gamah Israel va pai a, Ham' gamsungah peemta-in Jakob va om hi
Topa in ama mite pungsak mahmah a, a galte sangin amaute hatzaw sak hi
Ama mite mudahin, ama nasemte siamna tawh a khem dingin amaute' lungsim amah in kiheisak hi
Amah in, ama nasem Moses leh ama teelsa Aaron a sawl hi
Amaute in ama limte amaute' lakah na lamdangte Ham' gamsungah a bawl uh hi
Amah in khuamial sawl a, leitung khim a zingsak hi. Ahih hangin Egypt mite in ama thu a langpang uh hi
Amah in amau' tuite sisan suaksak a, a ngasate uh a sisak hi
Amau' leitang tung leh a kumpipa' innsung nangawn uiphukte tawh a kidim hi
Amah kampau a, thohonpi leh thokangte gamsung dimin hong om hi
Amah in a guah dingun gialpi, amau' gamsung khempeuh a taangsak khuaphialep, amaute a pia hi
Amah in amau' leengguite leh a theikungte uh vattansak a, amau' gamsung sing khempeuh a kuaihtansak hi
Amah kampau a, kauphete leh tangngolte, simzawh lohin hong pai uh a
gamsunga kung khempeuh, amau' leitang panin a gah khempeuh a nektumsak mang hi
Amau' sung pan a piang masa Egypt tacil khempeuh a satlum hi
Tua ciangin amah in ngun leh kham tawh Israel-te paikhiatpih a, amaute a vekpi-in cidamin thahat kim uh hi
Amaute a paikhiat ciangun Egypt mite lungdam mahmah uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute kihta uh hi
Amaute a liah dingin amah in meiipi kaisak a, zanin khua muhna dingin mei a omsak hi
Amaute in ngen a, vantung panin anlum tampi a pia hi
Amah in suangpi hong a, tui a phulkhia hi. Guntui bangin sehnel gamah tui a luang hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a siangtho ama thuciamna leh ama nasem Abraham a phawk hi
Tua ahih ciangin ama mite lungdamna tawh, ama teel mite lasakna tawh a paikhiatpih hi
Amaute in ama ngeina kipte zui-in, ama thukhamte a neih theihna dingun, amah in amaute tungah minam dangte' leitang pia a, midangte' nasepna gahte zong amaute a ngahsak hi. Topa phat un.
